stemHtml: You depart London Heathrow and shortly after take-off realise you must return, but need to dump fuel first. What instructions should you expect from ATC?

options.a: Proceed to the English Channel, fly a right racetrack pattern, climb to 6000 ft, and begin dumping there.
options.b: Climb straight ahead to 4000 ft and commence dumping upon reaching that altitude.
options.c: Proceed to the English Channel, fly a right racetrack pattern, climb to 5000 ft, and begin dumping there.
options.d: Climb straight ahead and begin dumping immediately.
